name: Zerobyte
short_desc: Backup automation for self-hosters, built on top of Restic.
description: Zerobyte is a backup automation tool with a web interface to schedule, manage, monitor, and restore encrypted backups across local and remote storage backends.
author: nicotsx

form_fields.label: Timezone
form_fields.hint: Timezone used for scheduling, for example Europe/Paris.

form_fields.label: Host path to back up
form_fields.hint: Absolute path on the host that will be mounted read-only into the container.
